phase3_findings.description: changeset prose 'Four ## Progress checkpoints' — coupled sibling of the docs four->up-to-four fix; ships as CHANGELOG prose
_deg 'wrong field type (issue str)' row asserts only the shared origin=unknown breadcrumb, masking the issue type guard
_plan_checkpoints has no within-batch duplicate-key guard: two identical absent keys write the marker twice and wedge future replays
no positive process-level control that a checkpoint INSERT issues a PATCH; combined hydration call shape untested
3-site handoff-origin vocabulary has no coupling guard/single-source
_CHECKPOINT_KEY_RE used ^...$ which admits a trailing newline (marker injection); prefer \A...\Z

fix_decisions.evidence: changeset 'Four'->'Up to four ... a normal fresh run writes three'
added dedicated 'issue must be an integer' branch-specific assert
within-batch duplicate-key raises _UpdateError (fail-closed); mutation-checked RED on copy
added INSERT->PATCH positive control + hydration-seam test
added 2 assert_pin_unique coupling pins for the origin vocabulary (workpad.py + workflow); the finding offered pin-or-comment, chose the idiomatic pin
_CHECKPOINT_KEY_RE ^...$ -> \A...\Z + trailing-newline-rejection test; mutation-checked RED on copy

skipped_checks.reason: working tree dirty (grades committed HEAD); runs live in CI, and shadow code-reviewer confirmed 0 skipped at committed HEAD 0f24a11c

phase3_findings.description: stage vocabulary (gate-adopted/claude-invoke/phase1-entered/phase1-hydrated) is prose-only, not a _CHECKPOINT_STAGES constant; a stage typo passes the key grammar (self-healing, and already caught at the workflow site by run.sh literal checkpoint pins)
5-field handoff record has no single source of truth (workflow writer + cmd_handoff_state reader duplicate the shape); self-healing to unknown
inline workflow Python handoff-writer has no behavioral test (presence pins only); degrades to unknown
checkpoint structural-rejection tests assert against broad _UpdateError type only, not the message; correct by construction today

shadow.park_calibration: clean: no parked finding matched a mis-grade shape (all 4 are self-healing/fail-soft maintainability or test-hardening notes; none is a fail-open guard, overclaiming breadcrumb, or dishonorable deferral)
shadow.fix_delta_gate: clean: operand-contract subset verified for both new guards; input-shape matrix fails closed; no vacuous tests
